text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our second summer camp has come to an end.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: All that's left is to head to the Sprinters Stakes.
choice_data_list: Go and claim a royal victory!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe. But of course! What else would I do?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: There's the confidence I was looking for.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's up, King? You've been like a true
sovereign of the sprint lately.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Sky.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Truth be told, I was a bit shocked when you decided to change course.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! What of it? And what about you and
Special Week?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll be honest with you. It's not fair you get to be
so bold.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei! King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ....Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I thought I heard you two talking so I came
over.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You see, I wanted to share something.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've improved a lot! I'm much faster than before,
so... I want to race you two again!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I want it to be just like last year in the Triple
Crown tour. I want to compete with you both so
that we can all get—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Are you suggesting we compete again to decide
which of us will be the star of this generation?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're pretty sharp, King! I was thinking the same
thing. It's about time we figured out who's the
best.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine! Come on, don't you think it sounds
interesting?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Taking each of our specialties into account, I'd
say a good middle ground between us would be a
medium race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We could face off again in the autumn Tenno Sho!
What'dya think?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The Tenno Sho, huh... One of the most
prestigious races where participants fight for the
Autumn Shield.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yup. Does that meet your standards, King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Mhm, quite so. It's a noble stage that befits me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The question is whether the two of you will be
able to qualify.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heh, someone's confident. Well, I'm already
looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...The moment I rush right ahead of you and cross
the finish line first, that is.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph. What's gotten into those two?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think it's a bit rude to suddenly walk up
to someone and demand a race?
choice_data_list: Birds of a feather flock together.
Birds of a feather flock together.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Am I actually like that though? I think I'm just
direct and know my position in life.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You know what, don't answer that. Let's just get
down to business.
choice_data_list: I'll support you in whatever you want to do.
I'll support you in whatever you want to do.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Right.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That's the type of person you are, always
thinking about what to do next for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I don't dislike that kind of attitude.
